```python
assert oracle_type in (0, 1)
```

```python
oracle_type = int(metadata.get("oracle_type", 0))
expected_bit = "0" if oracle_type == 0 else "1"

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, f"Expected total shots {shots}, got {total}"

assert expected_bit in counts, f"Expected decision bit {expected_bit} for oracle_type={oracle_type}, got counts={counts}"
assert counts[expected_bit] == shots, f"Deutsch decision qubit should be {expected_bit} for oracle_type={oracle_type}, got counts={counts}"

other_bit = "1" if expected_bit == "0" else "0"
assert counts.get(other_bit, 0) == 0, f"Unexpected outcomes for oracle_type={oracle_type}: counts={counts}"
```

```python
expected_bit = "0" if oracle_type == 0 else "1"

total = sum(counts.values())

expected_count = counts.get(expected_bit, 0)
unexpected_count = total - expected_count

assert expected_count == shots
assert unexpected_count == 0
```

```python
oracle_type = int(metadata.get("oracle_type", 0))
expected_bit = "0" if oracle_type == 0 else "1"

total = sum(counts.values())
assert total == shots, f"Total counts {total} != shots {shots}"

assert set(counts.keys()).issubset({"0", "1"}), f"Unexpected measurement keys: {set(counts.keys())}"

expected_count = counts.get(expected_bit, 0)
assert expected_count == shots, (
    f"Decision qubit should be {expected_bit} for oracle_type={oracle_type}, got counts={counts}"
)

other_bit = "1" if expected_bit == "0" else "0"
assert counts.get(other_bit, 0) == 0, (
    f"Decision qubit should not be {other_bit} for oracle_type={oracle_type}, got counts={counts}"
)
```
